code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut best = ""
mut best_len = 0
mut current = ""
mut current_len = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  mut is_end = false
  if i == n
    is_end = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        is_end = true
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        current_len = current_len + 1
      end
    when None
      is_end = true
    end
  end
  if is_end
    if current_len > best_len
      best = current
      best_len = current_len
    end
    current = ""
    current_len = 0
  end
  i = i + 1
end

print("longest=#{best}")
